category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Zimbabwe market (SAZ / ZWS standards).

title.en: China-to-Zimbabwe LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入津巴布韦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入辛巴威：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Zimbabwe market requirements — SAZ conformity and ZWS standards adopting IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / IEC 62471, energy labelling programmes, and POTRAZ radio type approval for smart luminaires — versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification. Zimbabwe operates at 230 V / 50 Hz and is landlocked, with imports routed via Durban or Beira.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与津巴布韦市场要求对照——SAZ 符合性及采用 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / IEC 62471 的 ZWS 标准、能效标签计划，以及智能灯具的 POTRAZ 无线电型号核准——并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。津巴布韦电网为 230 V / 50 Hz，为内陆国，进口经德班或贝拉转运。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與辛巴威市場要求對照——SAZ 符合性及採用 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / IEC 62471 的 ZWS 標準、能效標籤計劃，以及智能燈具的 POTRAZ 無線電型號核准——並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。辛巴威電網為 230 V / 50 Hz，為內陸國，進口經德班或貝拉轉運。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Zimbabwe law, SAZ / ZWS standards, applicable IEC adoptions, import conformity-assessment requirements, energy labelling rules, and POTRAZ radio type-approval obligations with qualified professionals and the in-country importer before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及在地进口商核验现行津巴布韦法律、SAZ / ZWS 标准、适用的 IEC 采纳标准、进口合格评定要求、能效标签规则及 POTRAZ 无线电型号核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及在地進口商核驗現行辛巴威法律、SAZ / ZWS 標準、適用的 IEC 採納標準、進口合格評定要求、能效標籤規則及 POTRAZ 無線電型號核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Zimbabwe should align product safety to SAZ / ZWS standards that adopt IEC 60598-1 (luminaires) and IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps), confirm with the in-country importer whether SAZ conformity assessment or import inspection applies to the specific product, meet 230 V / 50 Hz grid requirements (50 Hz matches China but the 230 V nominal differs from China 220/380 V), support any applicable Zimbabwe energy-efficiency labelling programme, and obtain POTRAZ radio type approval for any smart / wireless-enabled luminaire. Zimbabwe has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, REACH, battery, or outdoor-noise regime — substance restrictions are not a standalone Zimbabwe market-access barrier, though customers or tenders may still ask for IEC 62321 / RoHS evidence. None of these are covered by existing China CCC certification or GB-standard test reports, which are not mutually recognised by SAZ.
answer_first.zh: 出口津巴布韦的中国 LED 灯具制造商应：使产品安全对齐采用 IEC 60598-1（灯具）及 IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯）的 SAZ / ZWS 标准；与在地进口商确认具体产品是否适用 SAZ 合格评定或进口检验；满足 230 V / 50 Hz 电网要求（50 Hz 与中国相同，但 230 V 标称电压不同于中国 220/380 V）；支持任何适用的津巴布韦能效标签计划；并为智能/无线功能灯具取得 POTRAZ 无线电型号核准。津巴布韦没有欧盟式横向 RoHS、REACH、电池或户外噪声制度——物质限制并非津巴布韦独立的市场准入壁垒，但客户或招标方仍可能要求 IEC 62321 / RoHS 证据。上述均不被现有中国 CCC 认证或 GB 标准检测报告所涵盖，SAZ 亦不予互认。
answer_first.zht: 出口辛巴威的中國 LED 燈具製造商應：使產品安全對齊採用 IEC 60598-1（燈具）及 IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈）的 SAZ / ZWS 標準；與在地進口商確認具體產品是否適用 SAZ 合格評定或進口檢驗；滿足 230 V / 50 Hz 電網要求（50 Hz 與中國相同，但 230 V 標稱電壓不同於中國 220/380 V）；支持任何適用的辛巴威能效標籤計劃；並為智能/無線功能燈具取得 POTRAZ 無線電型號核准。辛巴威沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS、REACH、電池或戶外噪聲制度——物質限制並非辛巴威獨立的市場准入壁壘，但客戶或招標方仍可能要求 IEC 62321 / RoHS 證據。上述均不被現有中國 CCC 認證或 GB 標準檢測報告所涵蓋，SAZ 亦不予互認。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Each release; SAZ / ZWS adoption status, IEC edition references, energy-labelling programme status, and POTRAZ type-approval rules must be re-verified against official Zimbabwe sources on each review cycle.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted as primary evidence.
